leadText: Hunger Switch (Japanese: はらぺこスイッチ Hunger Switch) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Morpeko.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check for other moves/Abilities that can or cannot copy/replace/suppress this Ability. You can discuss this on the talk page. At the end of each turn, Hunger Switch switches a Morpeko with the Ability between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode. In Full Belly Mode, Aura Wheel is an Electric-type move; in Hangry Mode, it is a Dark-type move. Entrainment and Role Play fails if the user has Hunger Switch. Hunger Switch cannot be copied by Trace or traded by Wandering Spirit . Power of Alchemy and Receiver cannot be replaced by Hunger Switch. If Morpeko's Hunger Switch is negated or replaced, it remains in its current form. If a Pokémon other than Morpeko obtains Hunger Switch with Transform or Imposter , the Pokémon will not change forms. Hunger Switch does not activate while Morpeko is Terastallized . While Terastallized, Morpeko does not change forms even when switched out. Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Z-A , Abilities do not occur in normal gameplay. However, Morpeko will change between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode upon using Aura Wheel. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Hunger Switch has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check for other moves/Abilities that can or cannot copy/replace/suppress this Ability. If Morpeko's Hunger Switch is negated or replaced, it remains in its current form. If a Pokémon other than Morpeko obtains Hunger Switch with Transform or Imposter , the Pokémon will not change forms. Hunger Switch does not activate while Morpeko is Terastallized . However, Morpeko will change between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode upon using Aura Wheel.
